## Reviewed version

Please provide the reviewed release tag, commit hash, or branch.

```text
Release/tag:
Commit:
```

## Reviewer context

- [ ] Security researcher
- [ ] Protocol reviewer
- [ ] Cryptography reviewer
- [ ] Software supply-chain security reviewer
- [ ] CI/CD or DevSecOps reviewer
- [ ] Auditor
- [ ] Potential integrator

- [ ] Other:

- [ ] Critical security issue
- [ ] Protocol ambiguity
- [ ] Implementation defect
- [ ] Documentation correction
- [ ] Test vector gap
- [ ] Integration friction
- [ ] Future research item
- [ ] Question / clarification request

Provide a concise summary of the finding.

```text
Summary:
```

```text
Observed behavior:
```

## Expected behavior or recommendation



## Security impact

Describe the possible security impact.

- [ ] No direct security impact
- [ ] Possible misleading documentation
- [ ] Possible verifier inconsistency
- [ ] Possible canonicalization risk
- [ ] Possible signature or hash-binding risk
- [ ] Possible private evidence exposure risk
- [ ] Possible overclaiming risk
- [ ] Possible integration risk
- [ ] Unknown / needs maintainer review

Details:

```text
Security impact:
```

## Suggested remediation

If you have a concrete suggested fix, describe it here.

```text
Suggested remediation:
```

## Sensitive information check

Please confirm:

- [ ] This issue does not include private keys.
- [ ] This issue does not include seed phrases.
- [ ] This issue does not include production secrets.
- [ ] This issue does not include customer data.
- [ ] This issue does not include sensitive private evidence.
- [ ] If this is a sensitive vulnerability, I have considered private reporting first.

```text
Additional context:
```
